title: Blobbos [Cobblemon]
description: Add your favorite blob into Cobblemon !
body:
**This mod add Blobbos, a famous fakemon, in Cobblemon.**
![Blobbos and Friends](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a7771ad16a0a0dc78cf47d5778063493e62c0f0.png)
To install it, you need to put the file in your ressourcepack folder and **in the datapacks folder of your world.**

**This pack come with severals Blobbos variants :**

**Blobbos** (Ice/Rock) :

Abilities: _Pure Power_, _Huge Power_, _(Comatose)_

```
  baseStats: 
    hp: 42,
    attack: 17,
    defence: 36,
    special_attack: 15,
    special_defence: 25,
    speed:15 
```

Blobbos can be found rarely in the mountains. 


**Mega-Blobbos**: 

```
  baseStats: 
    hp: 42,
    attack: 101,
    defence: 56,
    special_attack: 5,
    special_defence: 45,
    speed:101 
```
(Since Mega-evolutions aren't implemented yet, Mega-Blobbos come as a form of blobbos, that you can spawn with the command ```/pokespawn blobbos mega```.)

**Alolan Blobbos** (Fairy/Ice):

Abilities: _Beast Boost, (Steelworker)_

```
  baseStats: 
    hp: 75,
    attack: 35,
    defence: 40,
    special_attack: 89,
    special_defence: 40,
    speed:71 
```
You can spawn it with the command ```/pokespawn blobbos alolan```


**Galarian Blobbos** (Ice/Poison):

Abilities: _Neutralizing Gas, Power Spot, (Libero)_

```
  baseStats: 
    hp: 46,
    attack: 57,
    defence: 40,
    special_attack: 57,
    special_defence: 40,
    speed:45 
```
You can spawn it with the command ```/pokespawn blobbos galarian```


**Hisuian Blobbos** (Water/Ghost):

Abilities : _Cursed Body, (Drizzle)_

```
  baseStats: 
    hp: 40,
    attack: 54,
    defence: 35,
    special_attack: 56,
    special_defence: 35,
    speed:35 
```
You can spawn it with the command ```/pokespawn blobbos hissuian```


**Golden Blobbos** (Steel/Ice):

Abilities : _Run Away, (Full Metal Body)_

```
  baseStats: 
    hp: 42,
    attack: 17,
    defence: 36,
    special_attack: 15,
    special_defence: 25,
    speed:15 
```

Ultra rare. Golden Blobbos can be found in the Nether.


**Blobbos King** (Steel/Ice): 

King Blobbos is the Mega-Evolution of Golden Blobbos.


```
"baseStats": {
  "hp": 42,
  "attack": 60,
  "defence": 145,
  "special_attack": 60,
  "special_defence": 145,
  "speed": 13
```

(Since Mega-evolutions aren't implemented yet, King Blobbos come as a form of blobbos, that you can spawn with the command ```/pokespawn blobbos golden mega```.)
